Title: CRITICAL: MongoDB credentials exposed in source code
Description: Production DB credentials hardcoded in application.properties (mongodb+srv://dev_divisha_app:Divisha%40123@...). Must be moved to environment variables immediately.

Title: Missing @PreAuthorize on ~144 endpoints
Description: Out of 423 HTTP endpoints only ~279 have @PreAuthorize. Unprotected endpoints allow unauthenticated or unauthorized access.

Title: Missing @Valid on ~76 POST/PUT endpoints
Description: 166 POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints exist but only ~90 have @Valid. Allows invalid data through without bean validation.

Title: System.out.println debug statements in production
Description: Two System.out.println calls in AuditLogController (line 1) and ProposalService (line 533) must be replaced with proper SLF4J logging.

Title: 230+ console.log statements in production frontend
Description: Extensive console.log/error/warn across 114+ frontend files. Leaks debug information and impacts performance.

Title: Email notification service not implemented
Description: EmailNotificationService only logs emails - does not send via SendGrid/SES/SMTP. Invitations and password resets fail silently.

Title: Proposal email notifications missing
Description: ProposalService TODOs at line 515 (send email on proposal sent) and 591-592 (auto-create Opportunity / update Opportunity stage on accept).

Title: Async data export not implemented
Description: DataExportController.requestDataExport() has TODO for async export with job queue. Large exports block HTTP threads.

Title: Webhook async delivery not triggered
Description: WebhookEventService line 231 TODO: Trigger async webhook delivery. Webhook events are created but never dispatched.

Title: Lead behavioral scoring returns hardcoded 0
Description: LeadScoringService.calculateBehavioralScore() returns 0. Should track email opens/website visits/form submissions.

Title: Lead scoring industry weights hardcoded
Description: LeadScoringService line 93 TODO: Make target industries configurable. Currently hardcoded to Technology/Finance/Healthcare.

Title: Warranty expiry alerts not sent to users
Description: AssetWarrantyExpiryScheduler logs 30/60/90-day alerts but does not call NotificationService. TODO comment at line 43.

Title: Audit logging missing for user operations
Description: UserService TODOs at lines 182/450/474: user create/update/disable not being written to audit log.

Title: Organization invitation limits not enforced
Description: OrganizationInvitationService TODOs at lines 60/72/162/245: usage limit validation and UserRepository methods not implemented.

Title: Last login IP address not recorded
Description: AuthService line 206 TODO: Set lastLoginIP from HTTP request context. Security audit trail incomplete.

Title: Tenant analytics growth calculation stub
Description: TenantAnalyticsService line 60 TODO: Implement actual growth calculation. Returns placeholder values.

Title: GPS spoofing detection not implemented
Description: AttendanceService hardcodes isGpsSpoofingDetected=false. GpsSpoofingDetector exists but not wired into field check-in flow.

Title: 3-way invoice matching not implemented
Description: PurchaseOrder entity has invoiceMatchStatus/grnId/vendorInvoiceAmount fields but no service logic compares PO qty×price vs GRN vs vendor invoice.

Title: Contract billing cycle auto-invoicing not implemented
Description: Plan specifies auto-generate invoice on billing cycle due date using ProposalService. ContractBillingCycle entity exists but no scheduler.

Title: Customer sign-off OTP flow not implemented
Description: WorkOrder has customerSignOff field and SignOffMethod enum but no OTP send/verify endpoints exist.

Title: WorkOrder photo upload endpoint missing
Description: Plan specifies multipart photo upload endpoint for work orders. WorkOrderPhoto entity exists but no controller endpoint.

Title: Work order auto-assignment service missing
Description: Plan specifies WorkOrderAutoAssignService matching engineer by skill+location+workload. Not implemented.

Title: Dealer territory → lead assignment not linked
Description: Plan specifies extending LeadAssignmentConfig with territory→dealerId mapping. Not implemented.

Title: PO approval workflow UI missing
Description: PurchaseOrderApprovalController exists with submit/approve/reject/pending-approval endpoints but no frontend pages.

Title: Dispatch map view missing
Description: /dispatch/map page for Leaflet/Google Maps view of engineer locations + open WOs not implemented. EngineerLocationController exists.

Title: Engineer management admin page missing
Description: /admin/engineers page for engineer capacity/availability/skill tags not implemented.

Title: Dealer tier configuration UI missing
Description: /admin/dealer-tiers page for tier benefit configuration not implemented.

Title: Checklist template management UI missing
Description: /admin/settings/checklists pages for creating/editing checklist templates not verified as implemented.

Title: Asset categories admin page missing
Description: /admin/settings/asset-categories page for managing categories with required skills not verified.

Title: Service analytics dashboard - engineer productivity names
Description: Engineer productivity table shows engineerId not names. Need to resolve userId → name via user API.

Title: Inventory analytics top-consumed shows productId not names
Description: Top consumed parts list shows productId. Should resolve to product name via product API.

Title: TypeScript 'any' type used 130+ times across frontend
Description: Widespread any type usage reduces type safety. Proper interfaces should be defined for all API responses.

Title: Missing error boundary components on individual pages
Description: Only global error.tsx exists. Individual pages need error states for fetch failures/network errors/permission denied.

Title: Environment variables not documented
Description: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and backend env vars not documented in .env.example or README.

Title: Null returns instead of Optional/exceptions in services
Description: Multiple services return null on failure (AttendanceService mapper, ProfileService, UserService). Should use Optional<T> or throw ResourceNotFoundException.

Title: OrganizationInvitationService UserRepository methods missing
Description: Service calls commented-out repository methods (existsByEmailAndTenantId etc) that are not defined in UserRepository interface.

Title: CORS allows raw IP without verification
Description: application.properties CORS allows http://52.20.26.167 — verify this is a legitimate production IP and document it.

Title: Proposal state machine not formally documented
Description: ProposalService accepts proposals in SENT/PENDING_APPROVAL/PENDING_ON_CUSTOMER but state transitions not modeled as explicit state machine.

Title: PO auto-reorder number uniqueness not guaranteed
Description: PartsConsumptionService creates draft PO with 'PO-AUTO-{timestamp}'. No sequence-based number like other entities. May collide under concurrent requests.

Title: Hardcoded localhost fallback in WebSocket and Chat providers
Description: ChatPanel.tsx and WebSocketProvider.tsx hardcode ws://localhost:8080 as fallback. Must use env var only in production builds.

Title: Purchase orders list page missing
Description: No /procurement/purchase-orders list page exists. POs can be created through GRN flow but not browsed/managed directly.

Title: PO number generation service missing
Description: PurchaseOrderApprovalService generates auto-PO numbers ad hoc (PO-AUTO-timestamp). Needs proper PurchaseOrderIdGeneratorService like other modules.

Title: Sidebar navigation section 'Service Analytics' item has no module guard
Description: Analytics/service and Analytics/inventory nav items in Sidebar may show for users without SERVICE_ANALYTICS permission depending on how module check is done.

Title: Real-time engineer location WebSocket broadcast on geo update
Description: GeoTrackingService saves location and should broadcast via SimpMessagingTemplate to /topic/geo/{tenantId} for live map — verify broadcast is implemented.

Title: Parts request creation from work order detail missing
Description: WO detail page /work-orders/[id]/parts should allow engineer to raise new parts request inline. Verify form exists.

Title: EscalationService uses findAll() on all tenants
Description: EscalationService.evaluateAllRules() calls ruleRepository.findAll() loading all tenant rules at once. Should be paginated or indexed query.

Title: AssetWarrantyExpiryScheduler uses findAll() for warranty check
Description: Scheduler calls assetRepository.findAll() and filters in memory. Should use findByTenantIdAndWarrantyExpiryBeforeAndIsDeletedFalse() for each tenant.

Title: ContractVisitScheduler has no tenant isolation
Description: ContractVisitScheduler queries visitRepository.findAll() without tenant filter. All tenants processed in shared context which breaks multi-tenancy.

Title: DealerPerformanceService scheduler calls dealerOrderRepository.findAll()
Description: Monthly aggregation calls findAll() loading ALL orders across ALL tenants into memory. Must filter by tenant.

Title: Vendor detail page missing linked RFQ history
Description: Vendor detail /vendors/[id] should show related RFQs and POs but only shows rate contracts.
